What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A woman with blonde hair wearing a black top stands behind a white table displaying desserts. A two-tiered stand holds small cakes topped with strawberries on the left, while a metal wire stand displays cupcakes with blue frosting on the right. Large pink and white cupcake cutouts serve as a backdrop behind a festive centerpiece of pine branches and red berries. The ShinDigZ logo appears in the bottom corner.
